/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -no-pie "CMakeFiles/haptic-device.dir/LJ.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/haptic-device.dir/atom.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/haptic-device.dir/boundaryConditions.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/haptic-device.dir/inputHandling.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/haptic-device.dir/potentials.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/haptic-device.dir/utility.cpp.o" -o /home/darre/chai3d-3.3.0/bin/lin-x86_64/haptic-device   -L/home/darre/chai3d-3.3.0/externals/DHD/lib/lin-x86_64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/darre/chai3d-3.3.0/externals/DHD/lib/lin-x86_64 /home/darre/chai3d-3.3.0/build/libchai3d.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -ldrd -lusb-1.0 -lrt -lpthread -ldl -lasound /home/darre/chai3d-3.3.0/build/extras/GLFW/libglfw.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -lX11 -lXcursor -lXrandr -lXinerama /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -ldrd -lusb-1.0 -lrt -lpthread -ldl -lasound -lX11 -lXcursor -lXrandr -lXinerama
